title: Visualizing the Gradient Descent on a Quadratic Cost Surface
description: A 3D surface plot showing a convex quadratic function (bowl-shaped) representing the cost, with a path descending from a high point to the minimum, following the direction of the negative gradient.
elements: Path of Gradient Descent (sequence of points)
relationships: The Gradient Vectors point in the direction of steepest ascent on the Cost Surface
The Path of Gradient Descent moves in the opposite direction of the gradient (negative gradient) towards the Global Minimum
Each step in the path is determined by evaluating the gradient at the current point
